steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is transferred from one vessel to another repeatedly during maturation.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Each transfer can mix a controlled amount of air into the wine while also separating it from deposited sediment.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: More frequent racking increases cumulative oxygen exposure and can accelerate oxidative development if not carefully controlled.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: More frequent racking increases cumulative oxygen exposure and can accelerate oxidative development if not carefully controlled.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
